meaning: 乞力马扎罗山[坦桑尼亚东北部](非洲最高的山)
examples: The classic cone shapes of a Fuji or Kilimanjaro are created when erupting magma piles up.
He made it to the summit of Kilimanjaro before collapsing.
The glaciers are disappearing, changing the face of Kilimanjaro.
When the sky finally clears, the snowy peak of Kilimanjaro looms above it all.
Tanzania's attractions include Africa's highest mountain, Kilimanjaro, and wildlife-rich national parks such as the Serengeti.
